dimensions.label: Value
dimensions.what_claude_noticed: No content exists to assess - all slots and banks are empty.
what_to_strengthen: Write a transformation statement that names the before/after your work delivers
Define a 3-5 step method with named steps, not generic labels
Add at least one teaching framework with WHY it works and HOW to execute

dimensions.label: Authority
dimensions.what_claude_noticed: No content exists to assess - all slots and banks are empty.
what_to_strengthen: Add a proof intro that orients your wins into a coherent narrative
Log 3-5 wins with specific dollar amounts, dates, and outcomes
Add proof points that tie your results to the transformation you promise

dimensions.label: Point of View
dimensions.what_claude_noticed: The single POV entry is a template placeholder, not real content - deducting relevance.
what_to_strengthen: Replace the example POV with a real belief: name the common belief, your counter-belief, and why
Fill at least one pov_flip slot with a genuinely contrarian stance you hold
Add a named common enemy - the force or mindset your work stands against

dimensions.label: Connection
dimensions.what_claude_noticed: No content exists to assess - all slots and banks are empty.
what_to_strengthen: Write my_story_text with specific turning points, places, and emotional beats
Add 5-10 micro-stories with sensory detail - named moments, not summaries
Map your story beats to your audience's journey so they see themselves in it
